problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
mechanism: Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure)
hypothesis: If Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure) is applied to without, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
